Penetration +30% when holding Rush
Grants self a Barrier for 1 turn upon entering battle (Irremovable)

+10% Ally Team Defense
+25 Action Points at battle start
+1 Chain Passive Weakness Gauge damage

ATK DEF HP +22%
Burst Level 3 Unlocked

バーストスキル2段階解禁

味方の防御力+10%

バースト3段階解放

【疾走】保有時、貫通力+30%
戦闘開始時、自分にシールド+1ターン（解除不可）

transcend.5_1_kr:

transcend.6_kr:

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy.
After attacking, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> (Ignores Resilience) and increases <color=#28d9ed>Catch Me If You Can</color>'s damage by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>. (Max 3 stacks)
If <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active, does not trigger an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response immediately after this skill is used.
This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.2:
Attacks an enemy.
After attacking, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> (Ignores Resilience) and increases <color=#28d9ed>Catch Me If You Can</color>'s damage by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>. (Max 3 stacks)
If <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active, does not trigger an enemy's Counterattack, Revenge, or Agile Response immediately after this skill is used.
This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵単体にダメージを与える。
攻撃後、対象の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>減少させ（効果抵抗無視）、<color=#28d9ed>【捕まえてみて】</color>のダメージを<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。（最大3回まで累積）
<color=#28d9ed>【疾走】</color>がある場合、このスキルでは敵の反撃/復讐/迅速対応が発動しない。
このスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
적을 공격합니다.
공격 후 대상의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 감소시키고 (효과 저항 무시) <color=#28d9ed>나우 유 캔 체이스 미</color>의 피해를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.(최대 3회 누적)
<color=#28d9ed>질주</color> 보유 시 스킬 발동 직후에는 적의 반격/복수/신속 대응이 발생하지 않습니다.
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
攻击敌人。
攻击后使目标行动值减少<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>（无视效果抵抗），并使<color=#28d9ed>【追上我啊】</color>的伤害提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。（最多叠加3次）
持有<color=#28d9ed>【疾驰】</color>时，该技能发动后敌方反击/复仇/迅速应对不会发动。
该技能伤害按最大生命值而非攻击力计算。

SKT_SECOND.name: Sweetie Driver
SKT_SECOND.name_jp: スイート・ドライバー

true_desc_levels.1: (Passive Effect) DoT taken decreases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>, grants immunity to <color=#28d9ed>Silence</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Priority Reduction</color>, and all attacks always apply with an elemental advantage.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and grants self a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn</color>.The Barrier amount scales with own <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>. Additionally, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active. (Ignores Resilience). This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.2: (Passive Effect) DoT taken decreases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>, grants immunity to <color=#28d9ed>Silence</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Priority Reduction</color>, and all attacks always apply with an elemental advantage.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and grants self a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn</color>.The Barrier amount scales with own <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>. Additionally, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active. (Ignores Resilience). This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

Additionally, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active. (Ignores Resilience). This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

Additionally, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active. (Ignores Resilience). This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.5: (Passive Effect) DoT taken decreases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>, grants immunity to <color=#28d9ed>Silence</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Priority Reduction</color>, and all attacks always apply with an elemental advantage.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and grants self a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn</color>.The Barrier amount scales with own <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>. Additionally, decreases the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> if <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active. (Ignores Resilience). This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
(パッシブ効果)自分が受ける持続ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNし、<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>および<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ減少</color>に免疫となり、すべての攻撃が有利属性の攻撃判定になる。

(アクティブ効果)敵全体にダメージを与え、自分にシールドと反撃を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
シールド量は自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどUPする。
さらに、対象の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>減少させ、【疾走】がある場合は<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>減少させる。この効果は対象の効果抵抗を無視する。このスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp:
(パッシブ効果)自分が受ける持続ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNし、<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>および<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ減少</color>に免疫となり、すべての攻撃が有利属性の攻撃判定になる。

(アクティブ効果)敵全体にダメージを与え、自分にシールドと反撃を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
(패시브 효과) 자신이 입는 지속 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소하고 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color> 및 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지 감소</color>에 면역이며 모든 공격이 항상 유리한 상성으로 적용됩니다.

(액티브 효과) 적 전체를 공격하고 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>와 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>을 부여합니다.
실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>에 비례하여 증가합니다.
또한 대상의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 감소시키고 질주 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 감소시킵니다. (효과 저항 무시)
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
(被动效果) 自身受到的持续伤害减少<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>，免疫<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>和<color=#28d9ed>行动值减少</color>，且所有攻击始终以克制属性生效。

(主动效果) 攻击全体敌人，对自身附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>和<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>。
护盾量按自身<color=#28d9ed>最大生命值</color>比例增加。
同时使目标行动值减少<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>，持有【疾驰】时减少<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。（无视效果抵抗）
该技能伤害按最大生命值而非攻击力计算。

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Catch Me If You Can Cooldown Reset\nExtra Turn
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 【捕まえてみて」スキルターン初期化\n追加ターン
SKT_BURST_3.effect_kr: 나우 유 캔 체이스 미 쿨타임 초기화\n추가 턴
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 【追上我啊】冷却时间重置\n额外回合

true_desc_levels.1:
Before using the skill, grants self <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn</color> (Irremovable) and decreases the duration of buffs on targets with lower Max Health than self by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>, then attacks an enemy. (Ignores Resilience)
If <color=#28d9ed>Rush</color> is active, DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>, and if the target is a Boss, DMG increases by an additional <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
After attacking, uses <color=#28d9ed>Hit & Hit</color> on the <color=#28d9ed>enemy with the lowest current HP</color>.
This skill deals damage proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

When attacking an <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color> or <color=#ffd732>Dimensional Singularity Boss</color>, DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp:
スキル使用前、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【疾走】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し（解除不可）、自分より最大HPが低い対象の強化効果の持続ターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。
この効果は対象の効果抵抗を無視する。
<color=#28d9ed>【疾走】</color>がある場合、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPし、対象がボスの場合はさらにダメージが<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPする。
攻撃後、現在のHPが最も低い敵に<color=#28d9ed>【ヒット＆ヒット】</color>を使用する。
このスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。

<color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>または<color=#ffd732>次元特異点のボス</color>攻撃時、与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
스킬 사용 전 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>질주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여하고(해제 불가) 자신보다 최대 체력이 낮은 대상의 강화 효과 지속 시간을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소 시킨 뒤, 적을 공격합니다.(효과 저항 무시) 
<color=#28d9ed>질주</color> 보유 시 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가하고 대상이 보스인 경우 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가합니다.
공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>현재 체력이 가장 낮은 적</color>에게 <color=#28d9ed>히트&히트</color>를 사용합니다.
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 혹은 <color=#ffd732>차원 특이점 보스</color> 공격 시 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr:
스킬 사용 전 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>질주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여하고(해제 불가) 자신보다 최대 체력이 낮은 대상의 강화 효과 지속 시간을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소 시킨 뒤, 적을 공격합니다.(효과 저항 무시) 
<color=#28d9ed>질주</color> 보유 시 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가하고 대상이 보스인 경우 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가합니다.
공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>현재 체력이 가장 낮은 적</color>에게 <color=#28d9ed>히트&히트</color>를 사용합니다.
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
技能使用前，对自身附加<color=#28d9ed>【疾驰】</color><color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>（无法解除），并使最大生命值低于自身的目标强化效果持续时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>，然后攻击敌人。（无视效果抵抗）
持有<color=#28d9ed>【疾驰】</color>时，伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>，若目标为首领，伤害进一步增加<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
攻击后对<color=#28d9ed>当前生命值最低的敌人</color>使用<color=#28d9ed>【连打连打】</color>。
该技能伤害按最大生命值而非攻击力计算。

攻击<color=#ffd732>异形怪怪物</color>或<color=#ffd732>次元奇点首领</color>时，伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

5_jp: ボスモンスターに与えるダメージ+20%

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, inflicts Fixed Damage equal to <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases own Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, inflicts Fixed Damage equal to <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases own Priority by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>：攻撃後、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>分の固定ダメージを与える。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>：攻撃後、自分の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>増加させる。
